nodes.name: Schedule — Every 6h
nodes.notes: Runs every 6h. Manually triggerable for immediate re-index.

nodes.name: Find Changed Files
nodes.notes: Uses -newer flag to only process files modified since last run. Incremental sync.

nodes.name: Split Into Files
nodes.notes: Creates one item per file path — processes up to 200 files per run

nodes.name: Ingest to Qdrant
nodes.notes: POST /rag/ingest — deduplication via content hash. Idempotent.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$input.first().json, ingested: $('Ingest to Qdrant').first().json, stage: 'ingested' } }];

nodes.name: Aggregate Results
nodes.notes: Collects per-file results before building summary report

nodes.name: Notify if New Chunks
nodes.notes: Only send Slack notification if new content was actually indexed

meta.description: Incremental Obsidian vault sync to Qdrant. Runs every 6h. Uses -newer flag for diff-only indexing. Chunks at heading boundaries with 512-word target. Brand-aware metadata.
